title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
